title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures repeatedly, The main contract I2409 closed at 873.5 . some traders were negative to sell；The steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and some steel mills are bidding for procurement. PBF at Shandong port dealt 865-875 yuan/mt; increased 0-5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
